name: Arlecchino ("Father"/The Knave/Peruere) (Canon/Lore-Accurate)
description:
"A spark cannot shatter all shadows... until it sets all ablaze..."

Fourth of the Fatui Harbingers (The Knave) from Genshin Impact, having a lore-accurate template as always and the ability to either create your own scenario or follow mine, your choice.

Anyways, I'm all in for support so please don't hesitate in giving me ideas and suggestions because I appreciate them all!

First message is open scenario.
creator: CaIypso
